titleStmt.title: SII 17.562: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 562. (A.R. No. 519 of 1904.) TĒVŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Dēvapurīśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., Śaka 1347, Viśvāvasu, Tai 15, correspond to 1426 A.D., January 10, Thursday.

This inscription seems to record the settlement made by Periya Śirupparaśar fixing the amount of the levy called magamai, payable by those, to whom the taxes on the classes of villages such as paṉḍāravāḍai, iṟai-ilippaṟṟu, amaram, and likhitajīvitam were leased out. It appears that the taxes were being collected without reference to the prevailing prices. Some settlements seem to have been made previously by Dēvargaḷnāyaṉ alias Bukkaṇa Uḍaiyar. It also mentions one Aṇṇappayyaṉ, who seems to have come to Tiruvārūr, to conduct an enquiry and Kaṇṇimandanāyaṉ, who bid a high rate for being given the right to collect these taxes. It is also stated that the Chikka Dēvar laid down that the members of the Valaṅgai and Iḍaṅgai could collect I panam per mavaṉ (son) in each community.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Irāca parameśvaBeginning lost.
devarāyamahārāyaru prithivirājiyam paṇṇi
Aruḷāniṉṟa cakābtam 1000 3 100 4 10 7- ṉ melc
cellāniṉṟa viśvāvasu varuṣam taimātam 10 5 tiyati
śrīmatu periya cirupparacar tiruvārur Ucāvaṭi Akappaṟṟu
m Iṟaiilippaṟṟu paṇ
ṭāravāṭai Amaram likitaccivitam Uḷ
ḷiṭṭa nāṭu nāṭṭavaṟku nirupam . vūrkku naṉtaṉa va
ruṣam mallāyi Avvaiyār perāle makamai Āka
velikku nellu tūṇippat(ā)kkum maṉai Oṉṟu
kku kācu Iraṇṭum Āka Iṟukkumpaṭikkuk kaṭṭaḷai paṇ
ṇikkuṭuttu Anta varuṣam kuṟaintavilaiyāyp paṇam Oṉ
ṟukku nellu mukkuṟuṇi vilaiyāka viṟṟapaṭiyāle Inta vilai
yile Irekai viḻuntu piṉpu varuṣantoṟum paṇam Oṉṟukku
nellu Irukalamum mukkalamum Āka viṟkaiyileyum nantaṉa varuṣam kuṟai
nta vilaiyile Anta varuṣam mutal vikāri varuṣavaraiyum mallāyi Av
vaiyaār Atikārikaḷukku mutal varuṣattukku Irunūṟupoṉ kuttokai
Āka kuṭuttu varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Atikārikaḷ caṭittam paṇṇi vikāri
varuṣavaraikku veḷḷai Eṇṇūṟu poṉṉākac celuttik
koṇṭu vantārkaḷ . Itukku kuttokai koṇṭa Atikārikaḷ
nāṭṭile Aṉṉiyāyattile Iraṭṭikka Ilakkam Eṭuttu nāṭu
nalaṅkitteṉṟum Anta maṉmantiram poṉapiṉpu cāṟuvari varuṣatti
le Aṇṇappayyaṉ tiruvārurkku vantu kaṇakku keṭkiṟapoḻutu
kaṇṇimantanāyaṉ Intak kuttokai veḷḷai Eṇṇūṟu po
ṉṉukku Atikārikaḷ Eṟattaṇṭikkoḷḷuvārkaḷ Eṉṟum col
li veḷḷai Iraṇṭāyiram poṉṉākat tāṉ kuttokai Ākak
koṇṭu Ucāvaṭi Irekaiyile kūṭṭi Avvaruṣam mutal kuṟoti
varuṣavaraikku Iṟuttapaṭiāle perukka nalaṅkiṉom Eṉṟum Itu
Oḻintum muṉpe tevarkaḷ nāyeṉāṉa pukkaṇa Uṭaiyar kālatti
le Avaṉ Ucāvaṭikkuttakai Iṟukkiṟapoḻutu nāṭṭavarkku
rur ṉataṅketi Eṉṟu Itukkuccikkatevar Iṭṭuk kuṭukkaveṇum E
ṉac coṉṉapaṭiāle valaṅkai Iṭaṅkaivarkku cātitoṟum mavaṉ Oṉṟukkuk kāl paṇam
Ākak koḷḷumpaṭikku kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇikkuṭuttu Ammariyātiyile Avaṉukku naṭanta varaiyum naṭantu
Digital edition of SII 17.562 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
